name: Monsanto Company
description: Monsanto Company was a prominent American multinational agrochemical and agricultural biotechnology corporation headquartered in Creve Coeur, Missouri. Historically, it was a leading global producer of genetically engineered seeds and the glyphosate-based herbicide Roundup. The company played a significant role in the development of agricultural biotechnology and industrial chemicals throughout the 20th and early 21st centuries. In 2018, Monsanto was acquired by the German pharmaceutical and life sciences company Bayer AG, effectively integrating its operations into the Bayer Group and ending its existence as an independent, publicly traded entity.
